positive: Stylized, minimalist illustration of a celestial forest scene at dawn. Focus on giant, glowing, bio-luminescent mushrooms and tangled roots forming an organic, dreamlike landscape. The composition should be centered, using strong negative space around the central flora cluster. Use a highly contrasting color palette dominated by deep indigo, vibrant teal, and ethereal gold accents. The style must be clean linework, graphic novel aesthetic, vector art quality, suitable for screen printing, high detail, symmetrical balance. Flat lighting, cinematic feel.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, messy, dirty, watercolor, grayscale, text, logo, watermark, artifacts, low contrast, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise
